data.title: Bending Spoons S.p.A. announces closing of initial public offering
data.description: In Milan, technology company Bending Spoons S.p.A. has successfully completed its initial public offering, selling a total of 57,971,015 ordinary shares at $29.00 per share. The offering included 34,398,640 shares sold by Bending Spoons and 23,572,375 shares sold by Selling Shareholders. The total gross proceeds from the offering, before deductions, amount to $1,681,013,435.

Iran FM: ‘Has CENTCOM brought security or insecurity to our region? The answer is clear. Equally, our Powerful Armed Forces have proven that outsiders cannot even protect themselves. Peace in our region can only be sustained when comprehensive and inclusive, with no outside interference.’

data.title: Omega Announces Second Quarter Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. (NYSE:OHI) has revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2026, on July 29, 2026, after the market closes. Additionally, they will be hosting a conference call on July 30, 2026, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results for the 2026 second quarter and provide updates on current developments. Parties interested, including investors, can tune into the conference call for further information.

data.title: Link Logistics Named to U.S. News & World Report’s 2026–2027 Best Companies to Work For
data.description: In New York, Link Logistics, a prominent operator of last-mile industrial real estate and warehouse properties, revealed their recognition on U.S. News & World Report's 2026-2027 Best Companies to Work For list. The Company achieved acknowledgment in three categories: Best Companies to Work For (Overall), Best Companies to Work For - Real Estate and Facilities Management, and Best Companies to Work For - Northeast. The U.S. News ratings scrutinized the Company's workplace environment and practices, commending their performance in these sectors.

data.title: UPAY Inc. Announces Petra Software Transaction
data.description: Dallas-based company UPAY Inc. (OTCQB: UPYY), known for its focus on technology and interests in fintech, compliance, software platforms, and digital infrastructure, has successfully finalized a restructuring deal involving Petra Software's branches Petra SA and Petra USA, along with Acheron Systems. The transaction is aimed at streamlining operations and maximizing efficiency within the company's technology portfolio.
NYMEX Natural Gas August futures settle at $3.1960/MMBtu.

data.title: Podium’s GEOpark, Recognized as Kingston’s First Zero-Carbon Designed Residential Building, Honoured With National Green Building Award.
data.description: In Kingston, Ontario, the residential development GEOpark, located at 485 Albert Street, has won the 2026 Canada Green Building Council’s (CAGBC) Inspiring Home Award. This project, in partnership with Vestcor, OPTrust, Secure Capital, and Blue Vista Capital Management, LLC, marks the city's first CAGBC Zero-Carbon Designed building. GEOpark represents a landmark achievement for Podium and its partners.

data.title: Kroger Names Emilee De Martino Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer
data.description: In Cincinnati on July 2, 2026, The Kroger Co. revealed that Emilee De Martino is set to become the new Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer, stepping into the role after Tim Massa, the current officer, disclosed his retirement effective September 18. De Martino will commence her tenure with the company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol KR, in the near future.
NYMEX Gasoline August futures settle at $2.9173 a gallon.
NYMEX WTI Crude August futures settle at $68.69 a barrel, up 11 cents, 0.16%.

data.title: Bimbo Bakeries USA Announces Sweeping Portfolio Commitments to Advance Nutrition and Cleaner Label
data.description: Five well-known American companies have announced their commitment to eliminating artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors from their products by the year 2028. This move is aimed at improving the quality and healthiness of the items they offer. The decision will impact a wide range of products across the brands' portfolios, with the ultimate goal of promoting more natural ingredients and healthier options for consumers. This significant change underscores the growing consumer demand for transparency and cleaner ingredients in their food choices.

data.title: SBI Crypto, a subsidiary of major Japanese financial firm, closes its Bitcoin mining pool operations.
data.description: The closure of its Bitcoin mining operations has been announced by SBI Crypto, a subsidiary of a major Japanese financial institution. This decision adds to the growing number of firms that have ceased their mining activities.

data.title: Nakama, Inc. Launches Industry-First Official B2B Marketplace Revolutionizing Global Anime Rights and Licensing
data.description: Leading anime companies are teaming up on AniBiz.com, a new B2B platform created by Crunchyroll's former CEO. Nakama, Inc. unveiled this initiative on July 2, 2026, in Tokyo and San Francisco. AniBiz.com aims to connect global buyers with major anime licensors, signaling a significant development in the industry. This move reflects a growing market interest and capitalizes on the immense popularity of anime worldwide.

data.title: HitPaw Unveils VikPea V5.4.0 With New AI Video Stylization, Face Tracking Beauty and Smart Import
data.description: On July 2, 2026, HitPaw unveiled the launch of HitPaw VikPea V5.4.0, the newest version of its AI video enhancement and creation platform. This update includes the introduction of an innovative AI Video Stylization feature. HitPaw is recognized as a top player in AI-driven multimedia solutions.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Lily McNulty Named to Az Business Magazine 'Most Influential Women' List
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Lily M. McNulty, a shareholder at Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Phoenix, was named one of Az Business magazine's 2026 Most Influential Women in Arizona Business. This recognition highlights her impact on the business community in Arizona. The editorial board of Az Business magazine collaborated in the selection process, honoring McNulty for her contributions to the industry.

data.title: A New Easterseals Film Puts Family Caregivers at the Center of their Story for America's 250th Anniversary
data.description: A short film on family caregiving was recently unveiled by Easterseals in Chicago on July 2, 2026. This release is part of a larger docuseries commemorating the 250th anniversary of the nation. Easterseals aims to shed light on the pressing issue of providing support for family caregivers. The nonprofit is emphasizing the need to address the needs of these caregivers in the midst of celebrating the nation's milestone.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads Broad Tech Drop As Dow Rises Mildly; Dave Up 11% For Week (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight increase amidst mixed trading conditions. Despite strong Q2 deliveries, Tesla stock showed a decline. The Nasdaq led a widespread drop in technology stocks, while the Dow saw a mild rise. Overall, Dave's performance for the week has shown an 11% increase.

data.title: Northwest Biotherapeutics Announces Scientific Presentation on Propensity Score Matching at the British Neuro-Oncology Society Annual Meeting
data.description: A biotechnology company, Northwest Biotherapeutics (OTCQB:NWBO), headquartered in Bethesda, Md., shared on July 2, 2026, that Dr. Marnix Bosch, Chief Technical Officer of NWBio, will be involved in the development of DCVax® personalized immune therapies for solid tumor cancers.
